states.name: Mysha
states.title: Knight of the Red Banner
states.description: Mysha was taken in by Gilgan when she was young and grew to love him as her parent. In Urg Roa, she spent joyful days among the kud. Yet from time to time, a question would cross her mind: "Who really am I?"

states.name: Mysha
states.title: Knight of the Red Banner
states.description: From a young age, Mysha would sometimes see the same dream. At night, deep within a dense, shadowy forest, she would be gently rocked in someone's arms. A gentle presence would whisper in a tearful voice, "Don't worry. Someday, I will come for you."

states.name: Mysha
states.title: Knight of the Red Banner
states.description: When Mysha set foot in the capital, she felt a premonition. If she came here, she was sure she would finally learn who she truly was. Yet, alongside that hope came a deep unease—as if an unknown darkness lurking within her were about to gape wide open.
